_comment: Each feed is one card on the display. To add a map, copy a block and fill in url. To remove one, delete its block or set enabled:false. refresh_minutes = how often to re-download. dwell_seconds = how long it shows on screen. stale_after_minutes = how old a file can get before the screen marks the source offline. page_reload_hours = how often the kiosk fully reloads index.html so design/markup changes reach the Pi hands-free.

feeds.label: Sea Nettle Forecast
feeds.note: Overview map that works out of the box. To show the full-color daily probability map instead, open the Full Bay forecast page, right-click the map, Copy image address, and paste it here. Seasonal product; expect it offline in winter.

feeds.label: Regional Radar
feeds.note: Animated loop. KAKQ is the office covering the Northern Neck. refresh_minutes is capped by the workflow's ~30 min cron cadence.

feeds.label: Tide Predictions
feeds.note: Open tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov, find your nearest station (e.g. Lewisetta or Windmill Point), open its tide prediction plot, copy the image address into url, then set enabled:true.

feeds.label: Marine Forecast
feeds.note: From weather.gov/akq marine/briefing graphics. Grab a wind or wave forecast image URL, paste here, set enabled:true.

feeds.label: Bay Water & Wind
feeds.note: From buoybay.noaa.gov or an NDBC station plot for a nearby buoy (water temp, wind). Paste the plot image URL, set enabled:true.
